results.rendered_html:
halya 1〉 paroxyt. = halasya karṣaḥ  P. 6,4,97 . m. Schol. adj. gepflügt  AK. 2,9,8 .  H. 968 . Vgl. tri˚, dvi˚.
— 2〉 f. ā oxyt. eine Menge von Pflügen gaṇa pāśādi zu  P. 4,2,49 .  AK. 3,3,41 .
— 3〉 n. Verunstaltung: halaṃ nāmeha vairūpyaṃ halyaṃ tatprabhavaṃ bhavet .. yasyā na vidyate halyaṃ (= nindyatva Comm.) tenāhalyeti viśrutā .  R. 7,30,22. fg.

results.rendered_html:
halya a.
1 Arable, to be ploughed.
2 Ugly, deformed.
— lyaṃ
1 A ploughed field.
2 Deformity, ugliness.
